raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Start with context","name":"Before we get into specifics, what’s been most on your mind at work lately?","description":"Safe opener that lets Priya set the frame before any concern or topic is introduced.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"pulse","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Post-launch read","name":"How has this week been landing for you since the launch?","description":"Checks whether the quieter stretch is normal recovery or something more lingering, without assuming either.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"pulse","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Quiet stretch","name":"I've noticed you've been quieter this week — what's going on underneath that?","description":"Observation-first probe into whether the quieter signal is just post-launch decompression or an unresolved issue.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Stuck surface","name":"What feels unresolved for you right now?","description":"Gets at the specific open loop that may be sitting behind reduced visibility or momentum.","purpose":"topic","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Mentoring follow-through","name":"What would mentoring actually look like in your week?","description":"Surfaces whether the mentoring thread is still real, and what shape it would need to take to work.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Own next quarter","name":"What do you want to own next quarter?","description":"Elicits her current ownership ambitions before any new work is introduced.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Trade-off check","name":"What would you want to leave off your plate to make room for that?","description":"Forces an explicit trade-off around new ownership so priorities stay realistic.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Leverage shape","name":"Where do you want to delegate more this quarter?","description":"Explores how she wants to increase leverage without assuming a management track.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support ask","name":"What do you need from me to keep the next two weeks moving cleanly?","description":"Identifies the specific support or decision she needs from her manager to stay unblocked.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Close the loop","name":"Given what we covered, what’s the first thing you want to tighten up before we next meet?","description":"Ends on a concrete next step without opening a new thread.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
